title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese describes Alex Hormozi's four-pillar AI usage system for business: data as competitive advantage, voice-first interaction before AI automation, workflow decomposition, and compounding effects. Marchese highlights a critical mistake Hormozi's team was making around AI implementation that required executive correction.
